arts.ttl: Barcelona open to selling midfielder Pep Guardiola has on Rodri replacement shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to enter the January transfer market in search of a replacement for Rodri. The Spanish midfielder has been ruled out for most of the season after injuring his ACL against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium last weekend. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola demands clarity from Mikel Arteta with promise of Arsenal 'war'
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has admitted he has been provoked into a "war" with Arsenal as he urged Gunners boss Mikel Arteta to explain his recent comments about his time at City. "He said he was here four years and knows exactly what happened here.

arts.ttl: Newcastle stars locked in feisty training ground inquest this week and some could be dropped
arts.sum: Newcastle were linked with Lille striker Jonathan David in the summer and the race is now for a clutch of teams to sign him on a free transfer. I’m a big believer in there’s no set team, everyone has to earn their place.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe forced into naming Alexander Isak replacement as Newcastle United star ruled out
arts.sum: The Sweden international suffered a broken toe in training last week and got through the 3-1 defeat against Fulham after pain-killing injections. Toon head coach Eddie Howe had said before the game: "He trained last week before the Fulham game and he had an injection in his toe to play.
